message:
test(e2e): add Playwright E2E tests for agent lifecycle and DCG workflow

agent-lifecycle.spec.ts:
- Test agent state display (ready, executing, paused, failed)
- Test lifecycle state transitions through UI
- Dashboard agent metrics verification
- Multi-agent scenario tests
- Error state handling
- Mobile/responsive view tests

dcg-workflow.spec.ts:
- Test DCG (Destructive Command Guard) workflow integration
- Verify command blocking and approval flows

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
